data.title: ISA Celebrates Fifth Annual International Automation Professionals Day
data.description: On April 14, 2026 in Durham, North Carolina, the International Society of Automation (ISA) announced the upcoming celebration of its fifth annual International Automation Professionals Day on April 28, 2026. As the foremost professional society in the automation industry, ISA will host a digital event to commemorate this occasion and recognize the contributions of automation professionals worldwide.

data.title: Vertafore introduces Velocity AI Platform and AI agents to power Distribution Velocity for the Insurance Industry
data.description: Today at Accelerate 2026 in Denver, the InsurTech company Vertafore® unveiled its Velocity™ AI Platform, which integrates artificial intelligence throughout the insurance process. This innovation is aimed at aiding agencies, MGAs, and carriers in expediting workflows, enhancing decision-making, and eliminating distribution obstacles. This technology is set to revolutionize the industry by leveraging AI to improve efficiency and effectiveness.

data.title: Ulike Joins the Smartwater x Coachella VIP Gifting Ecosystem at Sonic Desert, the Festival's Most Exclusive Experience
data.description: In Los Angeles on April 14, 2026, Ulike, known for its unique brand character that is trend-setting, high-end, and lifestyle-oriented, has decided to partake in the renowned music extravaganza, Coachella. This move marks the brand's entry into one of the globe's biggest, trendiest, and most profitable music festivals. Ulike's collaboration involves offering their bottled water at the event, showcasing their commitment to aligning with high-profile cultural happenings.

data.title: Sony Electronics Expands Gaming Gear Lineup with INZONE H6 Air and INZONE M10S II
data.description: INZONE has recently introduced a new open-back wired gaming headset, the INZONE H6 Air, to their product lineup. This headset promises an immersive gaming experience like never before. This launch coincides with the release of the second generation of INZONE's flagship esports gaming monitor. Additionally, Sony has unveiled the next generation of their OLED display with the fastest response time to enhance the gaming experience. Get ready to dive into the world of gaming with these cutting-edge products.

data.title: Wet Noses Expands Soft Baked Treat Line with Two New Recipes
data.description: A popular dog treat brand is releasing two new recipes in their Soft Baked Treats line. Wet Noses, based in Monroe, Wash., is known for using human-grade ingredients in their products. The new flavors, Peanut Butter Berry and Superfoods, are made with real and recognizable ingredients. The launch date for these additions is set for April 14, 2026. This announcement comes as part of the company's dedication to providing high-quality treats for dogs.

data.title: Mars and Nashville Yards Partner to Create Pet-Friendly Community in Downtown Nashville
data.description: Nashville, Tennessee - In a collaboration between Mars and Nashville Yards, a pet-friendly community is set to be established in the heart of downtown Nashville. This partnership aims to cater to the needs of pet owners by providing a welcoming environment for their furry companions. The initiative is expected to bring significant benefits to the local community, with an investment of [specific number] being allocated towards this project. Stay tuned for updates on this exciting development in the vibrant city of Nashville.

data.title: Kumo Launches KumoRFM-2, the First Foundation Model to Outperform Machine Learning on Enterprise Data, Scaling to 500 Billion Rows
data.description: KumoRFM-2, developed on an innovative architecture, has demonstrated exceptional performance on 41 predictive tasks and four key benchmarks. This was achieved without any feature engineering or task-specific training. It also allows natural language querying. The impressive results were reported from Mountain View, California on April 14, 2026.

data.title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES ANNOUNCES SABRINA CALLAHAN AS CHIEF DIGITAL AND MARKETING OFFICER AND NANDIKA SURI AS VICE PRESIDENT OF RAPID REWARDS
data.description: Southwest Airlines Co. revealed on April 14, 2026, that Sabrina Callahan is the new Chief Digital and Marketing Officer. This move reflects the company's commitment to enhancing Customer Experience and upholding its renowned Hospitality. Callahan will be taking on this pivotal role to lead the digital and marketing strategies. Southwest Airlines, listed on the NYSE as LUV, has now taken a step towards evolving its customer-centric approach with this addition to its leadership team.

data.title: Plant-Based Meat Market Expected to Reach USD 33.3 Billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 20.5%: Allied Market Research
data.description: The plant-based meat market worldwide is expanding due to the growing popularity of veganism, increased focus on health by consumers, and rising sustainability awareness. As per a recent report by Allied Market Research, the market is expected to witness significant growth. The report, released on April 14, 2026, in Wilmington, Delaware, highlighted the key drivers fueling this growth.

data.title: Earth Month Spotlight: Smarter Homes and Lower Energy Use; Tips That Can Save Hundreds Annually
data.description: Mercury Insurance is drawing attention to enhancements that enhance comfort, performance, and long-term durability of homes in a press release from Los Angeles on April 14, 2026. With utility expenses on the rise, homeowners are seeking solutions like energy-efficient upgrades. Mercury Insurance, listed on NYSE and NYSE Texas under MCY, is focusing on these upgrades to help homeowners save on costs and improve their living conditions.

data.title: Lethal Means Counseling for Military-Affiliated Women Must Be Evidence-Informed: New Research From Cohen Veterans Network Institute for Quality (CVN-IQ) Published in PLOS One
data.description: A recent systematic review, sponsored by Face the Fight®, examined military-affiliated women's perspectives on securely storing firearms for suicide prevention. Released by the Cohen Veterans Network Institute for Quality (CVN-IQ) in Stamford, Conn. on April 14, 2026, the study delved into literature to present key insights on this critical issue.

data.title: Century Complete Reveals New Homes Coming Soon to Hartwell, GA
data.description: Leading national homebuilding company Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS) is introducing affordable newly constructed homes to the picturesque lakefront city of HARTWELL, Georgia. Renowned for their expertise in online home sales and recognized as one of America's Most Trustworthy companies, Century Communities aims to provide attractive housing options for residents in the area. This development signifies an important step in meeting the growing demand for quality housing in HARTWELL.

data.title: SEI Names Adam Hartstein as Managing Director of Chicago Office
data.description: Bringing with him over two decades of experience in strategy, mergers and acquisitions, and business transformation, seasoned consultant Adam Hartstein has joined SEI in Chicago on April 14, 2026. SEI, being a prominent employee-owned management consulting firm, aims to leverage Hartstein's expertise to drive growth in the region.
